allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://2fa.live/tok/BKFJYB3CQGASCR7MLO4WDX5QC2LXH3K5' -Method Get -TimeoutSec 20; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { $_.Exception.Message; if \($_.ErrorDetails\) { $_.ErrorDetails.Message } })

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const p=require\('./package.json'\); const v=p.version.split\('.'\).map\(Number\); v[1]++; v[2]=0; p.version=v.join\('.'\); fs.writeFileSync\('package.json', JSON.stringify\(p,null,2\)+'\\n'\);")
PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:ProgramData\\ssh\\sshd_config"\) { Get-Content "$env:ProgramData\\ssh\\sshd_config" | Select-Object -First 30 } else { Write-Output "sshd_config not found" })

PowerShell(git diff -- src/cli.ts src/runtime/dsl/printer.ts src/script-builder src/runtime/dsl/checker.ts build.mjs package.json tsup.config.ts | git diff --check --cached; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { exit $LASTEXITCODE })
PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command chromium-cli -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { 'chromium-cli not found' })
PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { 'npx not found' })

PowerShell(for \($i = 0; $i -lt 15; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:9223/json"; Write-Output \($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\); exit 0 } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; if \($i -ge 9\) { Write-Error "Timed out" } } }; exit 1)
